title: Nitham Nitham Lyrics Bandha Pasam
stanzas:
koadu potu vazhnthavargal
eththanaiyo
konda kuriyum thavari
ponavargal eththanaiyo

surai vidhaitha nilathil
veru chedi mulaithathu
kadhal kadhaiyil paadhi
nadakkum podhu
sirai vizhunthadhu.(2)

thangai uyir thaanirundha
idathil nindrathu.
kandu angum ingum
indri ondru mayangukindrathu.

ilamai thulli ezhunthu nindru
kadhal endrathu.
kudumba nilamai edhiril
vandhu nindru
kadamai endrathu (2)

kadhalenum poo ularndhu
kadamai vendrathu.
endrum maedum pallam
ullathuthaan vazhkai enbadhu.

thani kodiyaai nadai ilandhu
thavithadhu ondru.
adhan thunaiku vandhu
thuyar thudaikka nindradhu ondru(2)

idharkidhuthaan endru munbu
yaar ninaithathu.
pali ingu vandhu
mudiyum endraal
yaar thaduppadhu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nitham Nitham'?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, reflecting on memories and emotions associated with relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Bandha Pasam'?

In Bandha Pasam, the song plays during a poignant moment that highlights the protagonist's emotional struggles and memories of love.

Who is the singer of 'Nitham Nitham'?

The song is beautifully sung by Sirkazhi Govindarajan, known for his soulful voice and emotional delivery.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Nitham Nitham' was composed by the legendary duo Viswanathan–Ramamoorthy, renowned for their contributions to Tamil cinema.

When was 'Nitham Nitham' released?

'Nitham Nitham' was released on October 27, 1970, marking it as a classic in Tamil music history.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Nitham Nitham' from the movie Bandha Pasam evokes a deep sense of nostalgia and melancholy. It reflects on the memories of love and the emotional turmoil that comes with it. The soothing melody, combined with Sirkazhi Govindarajan's heartfelt rendition, creates an atmosphere of longing and introspection. This timeless classic resonates with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nitham Nitham from the classic film Bandha Pasam captures the essence of nostalgia and romance with its haunting melody. The soulful rendition by Sirkazhi Govindarajan, paired with the timeless composition of Viswanathan–Ramamoorthy, creates an emotional experience that resonates deeply. This song is a beautiful reflection on love and longing, making it a cherished gem in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Every day, what is happening in my heart is what I have thought about.
How many people have lived by giving up their burdens? How many have gone away without any regrets?
Every day, what is happening in my heart is what I have thought about.
Every day, what is happening in my heart is what I have thought about.
In a world where love stories unfold, when they happen, the chains of sorrow fall.
In a place where my sister's life is, there is a feeling of confusion everywhere.
Every day, what is happening in my heart is what I have thought about.
Every day, what is happening in my heart is what I have thought about.
Youth rises and stands, saying it is love. Family situations come and stand, saying it is duty.
Love blooms like a flower, and duty is required. Life is all about the ups and downs.
Every day, what is happening in my heart is what I have thought about.
Every day, what is happening in my heart is what I have thought about.
One who walks alone has faced something. That brings pain to the food they eat.
Before this, who thought about this? If the burden comes here, who will take it away?
Every day, what is happening in my heart is what I have thought about.
Every day, what is happening in my heart is what I have thought about.
